arabic: وعن ابن عمر رضي الله عنهما، أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم نهى عن النَجَش، ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) prohibited the practice of Najsh..

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
